text.title: Decomposition: Django Monolith to Bounded Apps Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Repo has orders/payments/users with payments→orders coupling. Owner map: payments=core, orders=commerce. Forbidden edge: payments→orders. Refund model lives in orders but pays-flow logic is in payments. Move Refund: new file in payments/models.py + RunPython renames ContentType from orders.refund to payments.refund + updates FK from Order.refund_set to via contracts function. importlinter.ini forbids payments→orders direct import; only payments→orders.contracts allowed.

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
